categories.publicDescription: Public outputs must not include voter, shareholder, trustee, operator, account, or support-case identifiers.
Public outputs must not expose ballot choices, accepted-to-published mappings, receipt capabilities, witnesses, or private randomness.
Public outputs must not provide receipt recovery material or reconstruct voter-held capabilities.
Raw logs and diagnostics payloads are not public package inputs or outputs.
Raw trace samples, metrics payloads, and correlation labels that identify people or ballots are not public material.
Support exports may be represented by schemas, redaction states, ids, and hashes only.
Public-only validation must not depend on private repositories, local workstation paths, or restricted reviewer payload paths.
Secrets, credentials, tokens, keys, signing material, and provider details are forbidden in public outputs.
Private scanner findings and vulnerability details remain restricted and are not public validator inputs.
Generated wording must not claim certification, legal sufficiency, external audit acceptance, public/state election readiness, production rollout approval, or direct register mutation.
